# Procurement Compliance and Internal Controls: Navigating Regulatory Requirements

## 适用受众
Sourcing_Manager

## 写作角度说明
采购必须符合企业内控要求和外部监管规定。本角度帮助采购专家理解合规框架，确保采购活动经得起审计检验。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Procurement compliance—segregation of duties, competitive bidding, conflict of interest management—is not bureaucratic overhead but essential governance that protects organizational integrity.

## 参考素材
- Procurement policy requirements: approval thresholds, competitive bidding thresholds, sole source justification
- Segregation of duties: requisition vs approval, ordering vs receiving, payment vs authorization
- Conflict of interest: disclosure requirements, recusal procedures, annual declaration
- Documentation requirements: competitive quotes, price comparison records, negotiation rationale
- Regulatory compliance: GMP supplier qualification, FDA 21 CFR Part 11, import/export regulations
- Audit trail: requisition approval records, purchase order documentation, receipt verification

## 关键词
Procurement Compliance, Internal Controls, Segregation of Duties, Conflict of Interest, Audit Trail, Regulatory Compliance, Governance
